original_text:
### Graphic Elements — Waves
- Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
- Construction: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.
- Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.
- **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

relations.note: Usage guidance refines the base wave construction rule.

quotes: top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave
Fluid wave forms in **two colorways**: **Sunshine/Gold** and **Sky Blue/Deep Blue**; each in **long and short** variants.
top wave layer at **70% transparency** over the base wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) — always preserve the layered, translucent quality.

rules.intent: Preserve the signature layered translucent wave treatment and approved colorways.
rules.rule_text: Wave graphics are fluid, layered translucent forms (wave.form = fluid_layered_translucent) in two approved colorways — Sunshine/Gold and Sky Blue/Deep Blue — each in long and short variants. Construction layers a top wave (Gold over Sunshine; Sky Blue over Deep Blue) at 70% transparency (wave.top_layer.opacity = 0.7) over the base wave; always preserve the layered, translucent quality and use approved color values only.

quotes: Usage: alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds; to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Approved color values only.

rules.intent: Guide permissible wave placements while restricting to approved colors.
rules.rule_text: Waves may be used alone, or overlaid on photography or gradient backgrounds, to support layout flow, frame content, or add depth. Only approved color values are permitted.

quotes: **Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
**Masthead gradient with logo mark** (Sunshine → 0C,10M,78Y,0K, logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.

rules.intent: Standardize the approved masthead copy-holding device.
rules.rule_text: The masthead gradient with logo mark (masthead.background.gradient = Sunshine → Light Gold #faa31b → #ffe05c, with the logo mark placed at the lightest end) is the approved device for holding copy in masthead positions.
